headline: Eos pre-announces preliminary Q2: revenue $68–69M (>3× shipments YoY), gross-margin loss −69/−73%, ~$364M cash
summary: Preliminary, unaudited Q2 (ended Jun 30): record revenue of $68–69M on a more-than-threefold YoY jump in shipments; gross-margin loss narrowing to −69% to −73% (from −78% in Q1); total cash incl. restricted ~$364M. First quarter with both Line 1 and Line 2 commercial — Line 2 posting yield/cycle times ahead of Line 1. Full audited Q2 earnings scheduled Jul 29.

headline: Frontier Power USA Converts 920 MWh Battery Storage Project Portfolio Under Stella Strategic Framework
summary: FPUSA converted a 920 MWh portfolio (Blanquilla, Aransas Pass, Nash, Wallis) under its Stella Energy Solutions framework — further reservation-to-pipeline conversion in ERCOT. Total FPUSA pipeline cited at ~16 GWh (~2.7 GWh high-probability); closing contingent on the rights-offering funding.

headline: Ofgem LDES Window 1 minded-to decisions — only 16 of 73 projects provisionally awarded; Frontier UK largely excluded
summary: Provisional cap & floor awards skew to pumped hydro + long-duration; of Frontier UK's ~16 projects (~2.6 GW, all 8-hour) only one — Frontier Legacy, 65 MW — made the provisional list. The 'VFB/Zn' category does not confirm Eos vs Invinity tech. Consultation to Aug 7; final awards Autumn 2026.
